text: ROBUSTNESS of the construction: the picture-decisiveness verdict holds across a 9-setting grid (figure width 256/512/800 px x MIN_PX 2/3/5). 7/8 problems are decisive in ALL 9 settings; only geom_06 drops out, at the two smallest-figure cells (256px@MIN3, 256px@MIN5), because its narrow off-grid dip falls below the pixel threshold on a thumbnail plot. geom_06 is the corpus's single marginal problem on BOTH criteria (highest sampling-fragility N_all=86 AND the only decisiveness dropout); it must be rendered at >= default 512 px to stay decisive. Net: the corpus's picture-decisive+sampling-fragile design is robust, with one documented constraint on geom_06's plot size. q-0008's headline A/B (forced_visual vs forced_textual catch rate on this corpus) still requires a paid agent run.
